event_description: User views a game's top-up page, marking the start of the purchase funnel.
User selects a denomination (e.g., 514 Diamonds) in the checkout form.
User selects a payment method (QRIS, virtual account, e-wallet) during checkout.
User clicks 'Lanjutkan Pembayaran' and checkout form is submitted successfully.
User lands on the payment page and sees payment instructions (QRIS or VA).
User copies the virtual account number, indicating active payment intent.
User copies the invoice number from the payment or result page.
User views the order result page showing success, processing, failed, or expired status.
User submits the registration form to create a new account.
User submits the login form to sign in to their account.
User submits the order tracking form to check an order's status.
